item.title: Parallel Processing
item.author: Author
item.description: Parallel Processing 课程地址: https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-004-computation-structures-spring-2017/c21/c21s1/ 本章讲的是各种并行方案. 并行 并行大体上有如下3种: 指令级并行(ILP) 数据级并行(DLP) 线程级并行(TLP) 指令级并行 指令

item.title: System-level Communication
item.author: Author
item.description: System-level Communication 课程地址: https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-004-computation-structures-spring-2017/c20/c20s1/ 本章主要讲的是系统间通信, 按现在来讲就是总线(BUS). 前面讲了很多硬核的物理知识, 证明了单一总线因为传输线反射的问题, 无法

item.title: Concurrency and Synchronization
item.author: Author
item.description: Concurrency and Synchronization 课程地址: https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-004-computation-structures-spring-2017/c19/c19s1/ 本章主要是讲进程间通信(IPC), 不过是从硬件的角度来看. IPC里面常用的信号量, 其实也只是在共享内存中存入了一个数字, 而

item.title: Devices and Interrupts
item.author: Author
item.description: Devices and Interrupts 课程地址: https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-004-computation-structures-spring-2017/c18/c18s1/ 本章引入外设, 讲解了round-robin调度算法的优缺点. 首先, “IO阻塞"的本质是什么? 当IO请

item.title: Virtualizing the Processor
item.author: Author
item.description: Virtualizing the Processor 课程地址: https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-004-computation-structures-spring-2017/c17/c17s1/ 本章讲了CPU的"虚拟化", 不过这里的"虚拟化"是指在同一个CPU上执行多个程序,

item.title: Virtual Memory
item.author: Author
item.description: Virtual Memory 课程地址: https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-004-computation-structures-spring-2017/c16/c16s1/ 本章主要讲了从硬盘加载数据到主存的策略, 从而引出了虚拟内存和页表. Extending the memory hierarchy Virtual Memory Page Map Translation look-aside buffer (TLB) Context Summary

item.title: Pipelining the Beta
item.author: Author
item.description: Pipelining the Beta 课程地址: https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/electrical-engineering-and-computer-science/6-004-computation-structures-spring-2017/c15/c15s1/ 本章主要是讲如何讲前面做的Beta cpu流水线化, 以及如何解决流水线中会遇到的数据冲突/控制逻辑冲突等等. PS: 这章内容是真多

item.author: Author
